description_long: This rifle features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly purple body accented by black and neon green elements. The frame is streamlined, with a large, open trigger guard and an ergonomic grip, suggesting advanced materials and construction. The barrel is elongated and tapers to a narrow muzzle, while the stock is integrated into the main body, forming a continuous, curved silhouette. Visible mechanical details, such as exposed internal components and angular paneling, give it a high-tech, sci-fi appearance. The rifle lacks traditional iron sights, instead featuring a raised section that may house an electronic targeting system. Its overall aesthetic and proportions suggest it is designed for both visual impact and functional use in a modern or futuristic urban environment.
description: A sleek, futuristic purple rifle with black and neon green accents, featuring a streamlined body and elongated barrel. Its high-tech design includes exposed components and an integrated stock.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow muzzle and the symmetrical, streamlined body.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the ergonomic grip, and the open trigger guard, highlighting the neon green internal details.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the integrated stock and the back of the rifle, with the grip and raised sighting section visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the barrel, grip, and internal green accents, with more detail on the mechanical structure.
